name: dynamodb
description: Reads DynamoDB table items through the AWS JSON HTTP API (DynamoDB_20120810.Scan), authenticated with hand-rolled AWS Signature Version 4 request signing. Read-only source; no write support.

risk.read: external AWS DynamoDB Scan of table items

conformance.reason: Tier-3 native package (internal/connectors/native/dynamodb): Check/Catalog/Read are hand-written Go (SigV4 request signing, AttributeValue-envelope flattening), never routed through engine.Check/engine.Read, so this bundle's streams.json/spec.json exist only to keep identity/spec/docs/schema uniform with every other connector -- conformance's dynamic (fixture-replay) checks exercise the DECLARATIVE engine read path, which this connector never uses. Proven live by internal/connectors/native/dynamodb's own unit tests (dynamodb_test.go), ported rule-for-rule from legacy internal/connectors/dynamodb's test suite.
